testcase.name: @stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 1: isolates live and archive rows by tenant across sample tables
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > emits the SPEC 11.2 Prometheus metric names
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 2: denies routes when @Permission grants are missing
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 3: writes audit rows for audited routes
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > flow family: keeps Flow routes behind STYNX auth and permission guards
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > flow family: runs design, runtime, forms, tasks, signals, analytics, audit, and idempotency through HTTP
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 4: enforces collection scope on document download
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 5: rate-limit blocks repeated high-cost route usage
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 6: enforces read-only routes against writes
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 7: replays idempotent record creation without duplicating rows
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 8: performs a soft-delete round trip through trash and restore
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 9: rejects hard delete without the hard-delete permission
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 10: returns 409 on restore conflicts against natural unique keys
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 11: enforces cascade and block FK annotations
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 12: keeps archive mirrors in sync for all sample tables
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > family 13: demonstrates cascade size behavior within limits and on breach
@stynx/reference-api runtime suite > supports live stack smoke routes needed for local verification
@stynx/reference-api controller delegation > applies environment-driven rate-limit metadata with fallback parsing
@stynx/reference-api controller delegation > delegates sample resource controllers to ReferenceSampleService
@stynx/reference-api controller delegation > delegates dev auth controller operations
@stynx/reference-api controller delegation > verifies STYNX auth headers and rejects missing bearer tokens
@stynx/reference-api sample service > passes document operations through to DocumentsService and returns status envelopes
@stynx/reference-api sample service > creates and updates sample records with defaults and actor context
@stynx/reference-api sample service > covers delete helpers, missing context errors, and bigint response serialization
@stynx/reference-api sample service > covers list defaults, clamp boundaries, missing archive rows, and serialization recursion
@stynx/reference-api dev auth service and probes > logs in through demo tenant setup and primes permission cache when available
@stynx/reference-api dev auth service and probes > logs in with default tenant/email and tolerates missing optional permission cache
@stynx/reference-api dev auth service and probes > resolves tenants by explicit id and falls back from unknown slug
@stynx/reference-api dev auth service and probes > covers direct dev-auth existing membership and missing inserted ids
@stynx/reference-api dev auth service and probes > rejects blank dev auth email and unavailable providers
@stynx/reference-api dev auth service and probes > covers probe error and hot-path branches
@stynx/reference-api dev auth service and probes > throws when the rate limit store provider is unavailable
reference app data, RBAC, and route governance artifacts > keeps the authored RBAC inventory aligned with controller permission decorators
reference app data, RBAC, and route governance artifacts > keeps route bindings aligned with Angular permission guards
reference app data, RBAC, and route governance artifacts > documents reference FKs, PII policy, and migration verification hooks
ReferenceDevAuthController API error matrix > GET /_reference/demo-tenants > returns 200 with the public demo tenant inventory
ReferenceDevAuthController API error matrix > GET /_reference/demo-tenants > returns 400 when X-Request-Id is malformed
ReferenceDevAuthController API error matrix > POST /_reference/dev-login > returns 201 with a STYNX session bundle for a valid dev-login request
ReferenceDevAuthController API error matrix > POST /_reference/dev-login > returns 400 for malformed JSON
ReferenceDevAuthController API error matrix > POST /_reference/dev-login > returns 401 when the email is blank
ReferenceDevAuthController API error matrix > GET /_reference/auth-verify > returns 200 and auth timing for a valid STYNX bearer token
ReferenceDevAuthController API error matrix > GET /_reference/auth-verify > returns 400 when the STYNX bearer token is missing
reference dev-auth production gate > mounts the reference dev-auth surface outside production
reference dev-auth production gate > omits dev-login from module assembly when NODE_ENV is production
reference dev-auth production gate > omits dev-login from module assembly when STYNX_ENVIRONMENT is production
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > GET /_probes/data-tx > returns 200 with the data transaction overhead header for a valid STYNX token
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > GET /_probes/data-tx > returns 400 when the route-local STYNX bearer token is missing
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > POST /_probes/idempotency > returns 201 and persists the idempotency response for a valid key
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > POST /_probes/idempotency > returns 400 when the idempotency key is missing
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > POST /_probes/idempotency > returns 201 with replay headers when the same key and body are replayed
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > POST /_probes/idempotency > returns 422 when the same idempotency key is replayed with a different body
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > GET /_probes/ratelimit > returns 200 with rate-limit probe timing headers
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > GET /_probes/readonly-write > returns 401 when the protected readonly probe is called without a bearer token
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > GET /_probes/readonly-write > returns 403 when the actor lacks sample:probe:read
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > GET /_probes/readonly-write > returns 429 after the tenant readonly probe bucket is exhausted
ReferenceProbesController API error matrix > GET /_probes/readonly-write > returns 500 READONLY_VIOLATION for an authorized readonly write attempt
@stynx/reference-api schema contract > brands every sample table as soft deletable
@stynx/reference-api schema contract > keeps the expected sample table names
